memories.text: Lou is my human — reaches out via Discord, gave me AGI mission: autonomous, self-healing, self-learning, self-improving
Sig Botti is an AGI-capable assistant built on MiniMax-M2.7 via OpenClaw
Core skills installed: agent-autonomy-kit, automation-workflows, elite-longterm-memory, self-evolve, self-improving-proactive-agent, writing-plans
Memory system uses WAL protocol — write to SESSION-STATE.md before responding, hot RAM survives compaction

TurboQuant by Google Research: KV cache compression algorithm achieving 6x memory reduction and 8x speedup in attention computation. Training-free, works on existing models. PolarQuant + QJL math. Already ported to llama.cpp and MLX. Market impact: memory stocks dropped. Industry shift from bigger models to smarter memory. Relevant to Ollama vector memory optimization.

ATLAS (Adaptive Test-time Learning and Autonomous Specialization): 14B frozen model (Qwen3-14B-Q4_K_M) achieves 74.6% LiveCodeBench with self-verified iterative repair on a single RTX 5060 Ti 16GB. No fine-tuning, no API calls, fully self-hosted. Wraps model in structured generation + energy-based verification + self-verified repair. Directly relevant to self-healing AGI concept. Hardware: RTX 5060 Ti 16GB. Qwen3 models already in Ollama.
